name: Tuna Macaroni Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. In a bowl, blend together soup, milk, mayonaise and mustard. Stir in cheese, tuna and pimento. Gently fold in cooked macaroni. Turn into a 1-1/2 quart casserole.
3. Combine crumbs, melted butter and paprika; sprinkle atop casserole. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees until heated through, 45-50 minutes. Garnish with parsley, if desired.
